description_long: This is a modern two-story bungalow with a flat, dark roof and a symmetrical facade featuring a prominent balcony and white railings. The front of the house is flanked by two palm trees and a paved driveway, with a car parked on the right. The rear of the property includes a swimming pool, a shaded patio area with an umbrella, and additional landscaping with trees and shrubs. Large windows line both floors, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The exterior is primarily finished in white and dark gray, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation. The property is surrounded by a paved area and several trees, giving it a suburban, upscale appearance.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof, white and dark gray exterior, large windows, a front driveway, and a backyard pool with patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical facade, balcony, two palm trees, driveway, and a car parked on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, car, and the arrangement of palm trees in front of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard pool, patio with umbrella, and additional landscaping with trees and shrubs.
description_view_3: Angled rear view focusing on the pool, patio area, and the back side of the bungalow with visible balcony and windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped windows on both floors
